response.original_title: ((^^Elite シ Support^^)) How to withdraw money from Robinhood holding account?
response.overview: Robinhood withdrawal from a holding account 💳 works only when funds are cleared ✔️. 1 ≀ 888 ≁ 576 ≀ 2041 If your balance is locked ⏳,1 ∿ 888 ∽ 576 ∿ 2041  it usually means recent trades or deposits are still processing. After completion, navigate to the transfer option in the app 📱, choose withdrawal, and send money to your verified bank account 🏦. 1 ∿ 888 ∽ 576 ∿ 2041 Always confirm available cash before requesting withdrawal 📊.
